dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes methodological consistency in trend identification. Implemented dual-directional logic: LONG when price > 200-MA with rising 200-MA confirmed by break above 50-MA; SHORT with reversed conditions. Exit triggered by price crossing back below/above the 200-MA (trend broken). Used sma_200 > prev_close to detect rising MA trend. Applied identical methodology to both directions per the 'consistency_requirement' parameter.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter trades consistently using a defined trend-identification method, prioritizing methodological consistency over the specific characteristics of the trend definition itself.
